# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  parameters:
    location: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceManager/locations/{location}'
    vnetName: 'devVNet'
    subnetName: 'devSubnet'
    vmSize: 'Standard_D2s_v3'
    adminUsername: 'adminUser'
    adminPassword: 'P@ssw0rd!'
    numberOfVMs: 2
    osDiskType: 'Premium_LRS'
    osImage: 'Canonical::UbuntuServer::18.04-LTS'

variables:
  publicIPNamePrefix: 'pip'
  nicName: 'nic'
  vmName: 'devVM'
  ipConfigName: 'ipconfig'

  resources:
    values:
      - subnetRef:
          id: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vnetName}/subnets/{subnetName}'
        properties:
          privateLinkServiceConnection: null

  subnet:
    type: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets@2019-04-01'
    apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
    name: '[{subnetName}]'
    location: '[location]'
    dependsOn: []
    properties:
      ${{ if and(equals(variables('osImage'), 'Canonical::UbuntuServer::18.04-LTS'), startsWith(variables('osDiskType'), 'Premium_')) }}
        addressSpace:
          addressPrefixes: ['192.168.1.0/24']
      ${{ endif }}

  virtualNetwork:
    type: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks@2019-04-01'
    apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
    name: '[vnetName]'
    location: '[location]'
    dependsOn: []

  publicIPs: []

  for _ in range(0, parameters('numberOfVMs')):
    vmIndex: '${{ index(_, _ ) }}'

    nic:
      type: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/networkInterfaces@2019-04-01'
      apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: '[nicName]{vmIndex}'
      location: '[location]'
      dependsOn: [virtualNetwork, subnet]
      properties:
        resourceGroupName: '[resourceGroupName]'
        location: '[location]'
        tags: null
        type: 'Virtual'
        ipConfigurations:
          - name: '[ipConfigName]{vmIndex}'
            properties:
              privateIPAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
              subnet:
                id: '[subnetRef]'
                referenceName: '[subnetName]'
        dnsSettings: null
        enableAcceleratedNetworking: false
        enableIPForwarding: true
        virtualMachineProfile:
          networkInterfaceConfigurations: []

    ipConfig:
      type: 'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/ipConfigurations@2019-04-01'
      apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: '[ipConfigName]{vmIndex}'
      dependsOn: [nic]
      properties:
        privateIPAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
        subnet:
          id: '[subnetRef]'
          referenceName: '[subnetName]'
        primary: true
        loadBalancerBackendAddressPools: null
        virtualMachineProfile:
          id: '[nic]'
          referenceName: '[nicName]{vmIndex}'

    publicIP:
      type: 'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses@2019-04-01'
      apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: '[format("{prefix}{vmIndex}")]'
      location: '[location]'
      dependsOn: [ipConfig]
      properties:
        resourceGroupName: '[resourceGroupName]'
        location: '[location]'
        sku: 'Standard'
        publicIPAddressVersion: 'IPv4'
        allocationMethod: 'Dynamic'

    vm:
      type: 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines@2019-07-01'
      apiVersion: '2019-07-01'
      name: '[format("{vmName}{vmIndex}")]'
      location: '[location]'
      dependsOn: [publicIP, nic]
      properties:
        resourceGroupName: '[resourceGroupName]'
        hardwareProfile:
          vmSize: '[params('vmSize')]'
        osProfile:
          computerName: '[format("{vmName}{vmIndex}")]'
          adminUsername: '[parameters('adminUsername')]'
          windowsConfiguration: null
          linuxConfiguration:
            disablePasswordAuthentication: false
            ssh:
              publicKeys: []
        networkProfile:
          id: '[nic]'
          referenceName: '[nicName]{vmIndex}'
          primary: true
        storageProfile:
          imageReference:
            publisher: '[takes value from osImage.publisher]'
            offer: '[takes value from osImage.offer]'
            sku: '[takes value from osImage.sku]'
            version: 'latest'
          osDisk:
            name: '[format("{vmName}{vmIndex}-osdisk")]'
            caching: 'ReadWrite'
            createOption: 'FromImage'
            managedDisk:
              storageAccountType: '[parameters('osDiskType')]'
        plan: null
        provisioningState: 'Succeeded'
    resources:
      - ${{ for each item in parameters.publicIPs }}
        type: 'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses@2019-04-01'
        apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
        name: '[item]'
        parameters:
          resourceGroupName: '[resourceGroupName]'
          location: '[location]'
          sku: 'Standard'
          publicIPAddressVersion: 'IPv4'
          allocationMethod: 'Static'
          zones: '[join(",", array(0, 1, 2))]'
        properties: {}
